title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded. The incident occurred Monday morning.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in public spaces and the tragic consequences of planned conflicts.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
